_comment: Individual soldiers, Stage A of #32 (cosmetic). Visible in any battle, so this reuses the bundled showcase. Each regiment now renders as a formation block of one small mark per living soldier (wider-than-deep, facing-oriented), with a small per-type emblem at the centre; the block visibly thins as casualties mount. Purely a rendering change — the deterministic aggregate simulation is untouched (mark positions are a deterministic layout + stable jitter, never fed back into the sim). Flocking (Stage B) and per-soldier combat (Stage C) are follow-ups.
caption: Individual soldiers — #32 Stage A (cosmetic): each regiment now renders as a formation block of one mark per living soldier (with a small per-type emblem at the centre), thinning visibly as it takes casualties — instead of a single token. Sim is untouched (deterministic layout, no RNG, no balance change). Flocking and per-soldier combat come in later stages.
